_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for a cell nucleus (Class 11 Cell: Unit of Life -- completes the organelle cluster with plant/animal cell). Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Nuclear envelope
hotspots.detail: A double membrane enclosing the nucleus, separating it from the cytoplasm.

hotspots.label: Nuclear pore
hotspots.detail: An opening in the envelope that regulates movement of molecules in and out of the nucleus.

hotspots.label: Nucleolus
hotspots.detail: A dense body inside the nucleus where ribosomal RNA is synthesised.

hotspots.label: Chromatin
hotspots.detail: Thread-like DNA-protein complex that condenses into chromosomes during cell division.

hotspots.label: Nucleoplasm
hotspots.detail: The fluid matrix filling the interior of the nucleus.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational biology illustration of a cell nucleus, shown as a cutaway cross-section revealing its internal structure. Show these structures clearly separated and individually distinguishable: nuclear envelope (double membrane), nuclear pores, nucleolus, chromatin strands, and nucleoplasm. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, a muted purple-blue palette. Calm and flat: no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow, no 3D-render sheen. Composition: a single rounded nucleus, centered and filling the frame, generous even margins. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. Absolutely no text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark -- the illustration only. Portrait 3:4, high resolution.
